name: Starlight Double-Delight Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, margarine, vanilla extract, and peppermint extract; blend until smooth.
4. Gradually add powdered sugar and hot water, beating until smooth. Blend in melted chocolate.
5. In another large bowl, combine 1/2 cup of the frosting mixture and margarine; blend well.
6. Beat in eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
7. Add flour, baking soda, salt, and milk; beat until smooth.
8. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
9. Bake for 30-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before removing from pans. Cool completely.
11. Assemble cake by placing one layer, top side down, on a serving plate. Spread with about 1/4 of frosting.
12. Top with second layer, top side up. Spread remaining frosting over the sides and top of the cake.
13. Store in refrigerator.
